phase_history.notes: Core-first scope, OSC fidelity #1, .v2p import enabled.
Architecture + phased plan (A-G). OSC spectral targets locked from reference renders.
GUI = faithful VAZ replica (v1-test.html from VAZ2010_v4.html). Accuracy pass: fixed Lag Processor (added Time label + Dest dropdown). UI spec + style guide written, controls mapped to param IDs.

framework_selection.rationale: Faithful VAZ panel already built in HTML/CSS (VAZ2010_v4.html) with byte-accurate enum ordering; dense 5-column custom panel suits HTML over per-pixel C++ redraw.

clone_meta.source: Software Technology / Barry Klein - VAZ 2010 VSTi
clone_meta.osc_targets: Saw 1/n + analog HF tilt (-3dB@H16,-6dB@H24); Square odd-only 50%; Detune=saw ensemble; Wavetable default=sine; aliasing -42dB via 2x oversampling
